name: Gol Gappe Kitchen
description: Help Emersyn make delicious gol gappe in her kitchen! Mix the dough, fry the puris, and prepare the tangy pani. Serve them to friends and family before time runs out!
instructions: Tap ingredients to add them to your bowl. Swipe to mix the dough and tap the puris to fry them at the right moment. Fill each puri with the perfect amount of pani and serve to waiting customers!
flavor_text: "The crunchier the puri, the happier the tummy!" 🥟

difficulty_levels.name: Beginner Chef
difficulty_levels.description: Make 5 gol gappe with simple recipes and generous time limits

difficulty_levels.name: Home Cook
difficulty_levels.description: Make 10 gol gappe with special toppings and faster service

difficulty_levels.name: Master Chef
difficulty_levels.description: Make 15 gol gappe with secret ingredients and impatient customers

tips: Watch the frying pan - golden puris score more points!
Each friend has a favorite pani flavor - Ava loves extra spicy!
Combo bonus: Serve 3 perfect gol gappe in a row for bonus coins

name: Fashion Runway Star
description: It's fashion show time at the mall! Help Emersyn pick the perfect outfits, accessories, and matching juttis for the runway. Mix traditional Indian wear with trendy styles to wow the judges!
instructions: Drag and drop clothing items onto Emersyn. Match colors and styles to fit the theme shown at the top. Walk the runway by tapping to the beat and strike a pose at the end!
flavor_text: "Lehenga today, jeans tomorrow - fashion is MY superpower!" ✨

difficulty_levels.name: Fashion Newbie
difficulty_levels.description: Simple themes with helpful hints and unlimited outfit changes

difficulty_levels.name: Style Star
difficulty_levels.description: Trickier themes with limited time and accessory matching

difficulty_levels.name: Runway Queen
difficulty_levels.description: Surprise themes, strict judging, and bonus choreography

tips: Sparkly bindis go with everything!
Watch the theme carefully - Diwali themes love gold and red
Mia gives fashion advice if you tap on her in the audience

name: Emersyn's Magic Garden
description: Grow a beautiful garden with Emersyn! Plant seeds, water them daily, and watch flowers bloom. Create stunning rangoli patterns with the flowers you grow and attract colorful butterflies!
instructions: Tap empty soil to plant seeds. Drag the watering can over plants to help them grow. Collect bloomed flowers and arrange them into rangoli designs by placing them in the glowing spots.
flavor_text: "My garden grows happiness... and marigolds for Diwali!" 🌸

difficulty_levels.name: Little Gardener
difficulty_levels.description: Fast-growing flowers with simple rangoli patterns

difficulty_levels.name: Green Thumb
difficulty_levels.description: Different flower types with weather challenges

difficulty_levels.name: Garden Expert
difficulty_levels.description: Rare flowers, complex rangoli, and seasonal events

tips: Marigolds grow fastest but roses score more points
Buddy the dog sometimes digs up surprises in the garden!
Symmetrical rangoli patterns earn bonus butterflies

name: Bollywood Dance Battle
description: Show off your Bollywood moves in an epic dance battle! Follow the rhythm, match the dance steps, and challenge Ava and friends to see who's the ultimate dancing star!
instructions: Watch the arrows and symbols that appear on screen. Tap or swipe in the matching direction when they reach the beat line. Chain perfect moves together to fill your star meter and unlock special dance finishes!
flavor_text: "When the dhol beats drop, my feet can't stop!" 💃

difficulty_levels.name: Dance Beginner
difficulty_levels.description: Slow songs with simple tap patterns and forgiving timing

difficulty_levels.name: Rhythm Rockstar
difficulty_levels.description: Faster beats with swipe combos and spin moves

difficulty_levels.name: Bollywood Diva
difficulty_levels.description: Complex choreography with freestyle sections and crowd reactions

tips: Listen to the music - the beat helps you time your taps!
Ava's signature move is the twirl - watch out for it in battles!
Perfect combos make the crowd throw virtual flowers

name: Karate Kata Champion
description: Train with Emersyn to master karate! Learn kata sequences, practice powerful moves, and earn colorful belts. Break boards, perfect your stance, and become a martial arts master!
instructions: Follow the sensei's movements by swiping in the correct direction. Hold your finger down for power stances and release at the right moment for strikes. Complete the full kata sequence without mistakes to earn your next belt!
flavor_text: "Kiai! Watch out world, this yellow belt is going for gold!" 🥋

difficulty_levels.name: White Belt
difficulty_levels.description: Basic stances and simple 4-move sequences

difficulty_levels.name: Yellow Belt
difficulty_levels.description: Longer sequences with kicks and timing challenges

difficulty_levels.name: Orange Belt
difficulty_levels.description: Complex kata with board breaking and tournament mode

tips: Breathe with Emersyn - tap when she exhales for perfect power
Practice mode lets you learn moves without losing points
Each belt unlocks a new karate outfit color!

name: Reel Star Studio
description: Create awesome reels with Emersyn! Pick backgrounds, add fun filters, record dance moves, and edit with stickers and music. Share your masterpiece and watch the likes pour in!
instructions: Choose a background scene and tap record to capture Emersyn's performance. Swipe through filters and effects to add sparkle. Drag stickers and text onto your reel, pick the perfect music, and hit post!
flavor_text: "Lights, camera, REEL IT! Going viral in 3... 2... 1..." 📱

difficulty_levels.name: Reel Rookie
difficulty_levels.description: Pre-set templates with easy editing and auto-music

difficulty_levels.name: Content Creator
difficulty_levels.description: Custom transitions, timing challenges, and trend matching

difficulty_levels.name: Viral Superstar
difficulty_levels.description: Multi-clip editing, special effects, and audience requests

tips: Trending sounds give bonus likes!
Add Whiskers the cat for guaranteed heart reactions
The golden hour filter makes everything look magical

name: Holi Color Splash
description: Celebrate Holi with Emersyn and friends! Mix colors to create new shades, fill water balloons, and splash everyone with joy. Paint the whole screen in rainbow colors before time runs out!
instructions: Drag colors together to mix new shades. Fill balloons by holding on the tap and release to throw them at friends. Match the target color shown to earn bonus points. Cover the entire playground in colorful gulaal!
flavor_text: "Bura na mano, Holi hai! Let's paint the world happy!" 🎨

difficulty_levels.name: Color Beginner
difficulty_levels.description: Primary colors only with big target zones

difficulty_levels.name: Rainbow Mixer
difficulty_levels.description: Secondary colors with moving friends and pichkari power-ups

difficulty_levels.name: Holi Hero
difficulty_levels.description: Complex color mixing, dodging challenges, and festival parade mode

tips: Red + Yellow = Orange, Blue + Yellow = Green!
Leo hides behind the tree - find him for bonus points!
The pichkari power-up covers more area with one splash

name: Emersyn's Music Studio
description: Become a music producer with Emersyn! Mix beats from tabla and dhol, add melodic tunes, and create your own songs. Record vocals and share your musical masterpiece with friends!
instructions: Tap the instrument icons to add sounds to your track. Drag loops onto the timeline to build your song. Use the mixer sliders to adjust volume and tap the mic button to add fun voice effects!
flavor_text: "DJ Emersyn in the house! Drop the beat, not the samosa!" 🎵

difficulty_levels.name: Beat Beginner
difficulty_levels.description: Pre-made loops with simple drag-and-drop mixing

difficulty_levels.name: Melody Maker
difficulty_levels.description: Custom beats with rhythm matching and instrument unlocks

difficulty_levels.name: Music Producer
difficulty_levels.description: Full studio access with layering, effects, and concert mode

tips: The tabla sounds amazing with the electronic beats!
Ava can add backup vocals if you invite her to the studio
Songs you create can be used in Dance Battle mode!

name: Mia's Art Studio
description: Join Mia and Emersyn for creative art time! Draw, paint, and decorate with glitter and gems. Create beautiful mehndi designs, Diwali cards, and frame-worthy masterpieces!
instructions: Select brushes and colors from the palette. Draw on the canvas by dragging your finger. Use stamps for quick designs and shake your device to add glitter! Save your artwork to Emersyn's gallery.
flavor_text: "Every masterpiece starts with a single sparkly dot!" 🖼️

difficulty_levels.name: Little Artist
difficulty_levels.description: Coloring pages with guided outlines and basic tools

difficulty_levels.name: Creative Star
difficulty_levels.description: Blank canvas with stencils, stamps, and special brushes

difficulty_levels.name: Art Master
difficulty_levels.description: Challenge themes, mehndi designer, and art gallery exhibitions

tips: Mia's favorite color is purple - use it for bonus friendship points!
Mehndi designs look best with the fine tip brush
Your art can decorate Emersyn's bedroom walls!

name: Mall Shopping Spree
description: Hit the mall with Emersyn for a shopping adventure! Find items on your list, hunt for deals, and ride the escalators between floors. Don't forget to stop at the food court for Frooti and french fries!
instructions: Swipe to move through the mall and tap on stores to enter. Find items that match your shopping list and drag them to your cart. Manage your budget wisely and collect discount coupons for bonus savings!
flavor_text: "Escalator rides AND shopping? Best. Day. EVER!" 🛍️

difficulty_levels.name: Window Shopper
difficulty_levels.description: Small shopping list with unlimited budget and store hints

difficulty_levels.name: Smart Shopper
difficulty_levels.description: Budget management with sales hunting and time limits

difficulty_levels.name: Shopping Expert
difficulty_levels.description: Complex lists, coupon combos, and VIP store access

tips: The Shopkeeper gives hints if you're stuck finding items
Riding escalators between shops saves time!
Food court breaks restore your shopping energy meter

name: Puzzle Party with Leo
description: Solve puzzles with Leo the bookworm! Match patterns, complete jigsaws, and crack codes. Each puzzle reveals a piece of a magical storybook that Leo is writing!
instructions: Drag puzzle pieces to their correct spots or tap matching tiles to clear them. Look for patterns and use hint books if you get stuck. Complete puzzles before the timer runs out to unlock story pages!
flavor_text: "Leo says thinking is fun... and you know what? He's RIGHT!" 🧩

difficulty_levels.name: Puzzle Starter
difficulty_levels.description: Simple matching with large pieces and helpful guides

difficulty_levels.name: Brain Builder
difficulty_levels.description: Pattern recognition with rotating pieces and fewer hints

difficulty_levels.name: Puzzle Master
difficulty_levels.description: Complex logic puzzles with mystery codes and speed challenges

tips: Leo's hint books are hidden in the corners - tap to reveal!
Edge pieces first, just like Leo taught Emersyn!
Completed storybook pages unlock special bedtime stories

name: Pet Paradise
description: Take care of Whiskers, Buddy, and Cotton! Feed them yummy treats, give them baths, play fetch, and dress them in adorable outfits. Happy pets mean lots of cuddles and surprises!
instructions: Tap on a pet to select them. Drag food to their bowls, scrub them clean in the bath, and tap toys to play together. Watch their happiness hearts fill up and collect the love they give back!
flavor_text: "Whiskers wants brushies, Buddy wants belly rubs, Cotton wants EVERYTHING!" 🐾

difficulty_levels.name: Pet Friend
difficulty_levels.description: One pet at a time with simple needs and slow timers

difficulty_levels.name: Pet Parent
difficulty_levels.description: Multiple pets with different needs and mini-games

difficulty_levels.name: Pet Expert
difficulty_levels.description: All three pets, special requests, and pet show competitions

tips: Whiskers loves the feather toy, Buddy loves the squeaky ball!
Cotton the bunny hops faster when she's extra happy
Pet costumes unlock after reaching maximum happiness!

name: Hide and Seek Adventure
description: Play hide and seek with Ava, Mia, and Leo! Search through Emersyn's house, garden, and playground to find your hiding friends. But watch out - they might change spots when you're not looking!
instructions: Tap on objects to search behind them. Look for giggles and movement hints to find hiding friends. Find everyone before the timer ends! In hiding mode, tap the perfect spot and stay very still!
flavor_text: "Ready or not, here I come! ...Is that Leo's book sticking out?" 👀

difficulty_levels.name: Seeker Starter
difficulty_levels.description: Obvious hiding spots with lots of hints and giggles

difficulty_levels.name: Super Seeker
difficulty_levels.description: Trickier spots across multiple rooms with fewer hints

difficulty_levels.name: Hide & Seek Champion
difficulty_levels.description: Friends move between spots, pets give false clues, bonus rounds

tips: Ava always giggles - listen for her!
Leo brings his book everywhere, even when hiding
The pets sometimes point to where friends are hiding!

name: Amusement Park Dash
description: Race through the amusement park with Emersyn! Dodge bumper cars, leap over cotton candy carts, and collect tickets while running past the ferris wheel and roller coaster!
instructions: Swipe up to jump over obstacles and swipe down to slide under barriers. Tilt your device to move between lanes. Collect golden tickets and grab power-ups like speed boosts and magnets!
flavor_text: "Faster than the roller coaster! Well... almost!" 🎢

difficulty_levels.name: Park Jogger
difficulty_levels.description: Slow speed with wide lanes and few obstacles

difficulty_levels.name: Speed Runner
difficulty_levels.description: Faster pace with more obstacles and power-up combos

difficulty_levels.name: Dash Champion
difficulty_levels.description: Maximum speed with moving obstacles and boss chase sequences

tips: The magnet power-up pulls all nearby tickets to you!
Jump on bumper cars for a super bounce boost
Cotton candy stands give you a temporary speed burst

name: Diwali Star Catcher
description: It's Diwali night and the sky is full of magical stars! Help Emersyn catch falling stars and diyas to light up her home. Create beautiful patterns of light and celebrate the festival of lights!
instructions: Move Emersyn left and right to catch falling stars and glowing diyas. Avoid the rain clouds that try to dim your lights. Fill the light meter to create a spectacular Diwali firework finale!
flavor_text: "Catching stars and spreading light - Happy Diwali, everyone!" ⭐

difficulty_levels.name: Star Beginner
difficulty_levels.description: Slow-falling stars with a wide catching area

difficulty_levels.name: Light Collector
difficulty_levels.description: Faster stars with special golden diyas and small obstacles

difficulty_levels.name: Diwali Star
difficulty_levels.description: Shooting stars, combo chains, and spectacular firework patterns

tips: Golden diyas are worth 5 regular stars!
Catch stars in a row without missing for combo bonuses
The rangoli platform power-up makes you catch stars automatically for 5 seconds
